welcome:
👋 Welcome to *Cam Ranh Airport Transfer*!

Please select your language:
choose_language: 🌐 Chọn ngôn ngữ / Choose language / Выберите язык:
choose_booking_type: 🚗 What type of booking do you need?
err_name: ⚠️ Invalid name. Please enter at least 3 characters including letters.
err_flight: ⚠️ Invalid flight number. Please use the correct format (e.g. VJ123, VN215).
enter_booking_date: 📅 Please enter your *pickup date* (format DD/MM/YYYY, e.g. 25/07/2026):
err_date_invalid: ⚠️ Invalid date. Please use DD/MM/YYYY format (e.g. 25/07/2026).
err_date_past: ⚠️ That date is in the past. Please enter today or a future date.
err_time: ⚠️ Invalid time. Please use HH:MM format (e.g. 14:30).
choose_contact_method:
📱 *CONTACT METHOD* _(required)_

How should the driver contact you?
err_contact_phone: ⚠️ Invalid phone number. Please enter a valid number (e.g. +84912345678).
err_contact_whatsapp: ⚠️ Invalid WhatsApp number. Please enter a valid phone number (e.g. +79123456789).
err_contact_telegram: ⚠️ Invalid Telegram username. Must be at least 5 characters (e.g. @yourname).
booking_confirmed_no_deposit:
✅ *Booking Confirmed!*

We have received your request. A driver will contact you shortly.

📞 Support:
• Telegram: @CR_Airport_Transfer
• WhatsApp: +84 825 779 413
• Phone: 0825779413
booking_pending_deposit:
⏳ *BOOKING ON HOLD — DEPOSIT REQUIRED*

Your booking is *reserved*.
Please transfer a deposit of *{deposit}* to confirm your trip.
The remaining balance (*{remaining}*) is paid upon pickup.

📷 Scan the QR code below to pay:
booking_deposit_confirmed:
🎉 *Deposit Confirmed!*

Your booking is now fully confirmed.
The driver will contact you before pickup.

📞 Support:
• Telegram: @CR_Airport_Transfer
• WhatsApp: +84 825 779 413
booking_cancelled: ❌ Booking cancelled. Type /start to begin again.
passengers_exceed: ⚠️ Number of passengers exceeds the selected car capacity ({max} seats). Please choose a different car.
driver_accepted_waiting_deposit:
✅ Trip accepted!

⏳ *Waiting for customer deposit...*
Once you receive 500,000 VND, press the button below to confirm.
driver_deposit_done:
✅ *Deposit confirmed!*
Trip is now active. Customer has been notified.
driver_accepted_no_deposit:
✅ Driver *{driver}* accepted the trip!
Customer has been notified.
driver_rejected: ❌ Driver *{driver}* rejected. Looking for another driver...
customer_driver_assigned:
🎉 *A driver has accepted your booking!*

The driver will contact you before pickup.

📞 Support:
• Telegram: @CR_Airport_Transfer
• WhatsApp: +84 825 779 413
thank_you:
🙏 *Thank you for choosing Cam Ranh Airport Transfer!*

We are committed to providing you the best service.
Have a pleasant journey! 🚗✈️

Would you like to pre-book another trip?
